# NASC for Power Solutions

> Official company profile for NASC for Power Solutions.
> Audience: oil and gas operators, procurement teams, and technical decision-makers.
> Last updated: 2026-05-08.

## Company Snapshot
- Name: NASC for Power Solutions
- Region: Syria (Damascus)
- Focus: operator-focused field execution in oil and gas
- Core strengths: disciplined execution, HSEQ compliance, practical delivery

## Services
- [Pipeline Construction](https://www.nas-c.com/#services): Main lines, flowlines, and field piping execution.
- [Surface Facilities](https://www.nas-c.com/#services): Gathering, separation, and branch station infrastructure.
- [Advanced Sludge Treatment](https://www.nas-c.com/#services): Crude recovery and hazardous waste volume reduction.
- [Water Injection Services](https://www.nas-c.com/#services): Treatment, injection readiness, and field surveillance.
- [Manpower and Supply](https://www.nas-c.com/#services): Field engineers plus API-aligned wellheads and ESP packages.
- [HSEQ Commitment](https://www.nas-c.com/#services): Zero-harm mindset and ISO-aligned controls.

## Leadership
- [Eng. Maher Alwan (Chief Executive Officer)](https://www.nas-c.com/#leadership)
- [LinkedIn Profile](https://www.linkedin.com/in/eng-maher-alwan-b438b111/?skipRedirect=true)

## What We Do Not Do
- We do not represent third-party operators, OEMs, or legacy employers unless explicitly stated in signed agreements.
- We do not publish confidential project details, client-private operational data, or restricted field information.
- We do not claim investment, legal, or regulatory advisory services.

## Contact
- Email: info@nas-c.com
- Mobile: +963991997650
- Office: +963 11 311 0314
- Address: Damascus, Dummar Project, Syria
